🎵 VOZZ RICH - ELECTRONIC PRESS KIT 2025 🎵

🎧 ARTIST PROFILE
• Genre: Electronic/House/Dance
• Based: United States
• Signature Sound: Fusion of Detroit house, underground rave, salsa, techno, and big room

📈 STREAMING & SOCIAL METRICS
• Spotify Monthly Listeners: 24,778
• Spotify Followers: 4,109
• Instagram Followers: 4,875
• Total Track Count: 47 releases

🔥 NOTABLE RELEASES (2024-2025)
• "House Ablaze" - December 2024
• "She's Burning High" (Vozz Edit) w/ Leigh Macneil - December 2024
• "Safe and Sound" w/ Kicevski - October 2024
• "Mi Corazon Batalla" - August 2024
• "Breathless" w/ L25 - July 2024

🎨 PRODUCTION STYLE
• Blend of Latin influences with modern house elements
• Strong focus on dance-floor ready productions
• Versatility shown through original tracks and remixes
• Signature fusion of underground and commercial sounds

• Consistent release schedule throughout 2024
• Strong streaming performance with 20,000+ monthly listeners baseline
• Growing international presence across major streaming platforms
• Regular collaboration with established artists
